name: idea-to-deploy
description: Vendor-neutral harness engineering methodology from idea to deployed and hardened product, packaged for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use the Idea to Deploy contracts, skills, lifecycle gates, persistent state, and verification discipline from Codex without forking the methodology core.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Idea to Deploy: read AGENTS.md and .itd contracts, preserve WIP=1, and verify completion with evidence.
